reviews.comment:
Un lugar hermoso para parar un rato y descansar super arbolado
Con respecto a la ypf los cafés son pura espuma no tienen casi leche pedimos y no pudimos tomar nada porque era solo espuma una lastima ojalá puedan mejorar asi sería genial

(Translated by Google)
A beautiful place to stop for a while and relax, very wooded.
Regarding the YPF station, the coffees are pure foam, they barely have any milk. We ordered and couldn't get any because it was just foam. A shame, hopefully they can improve, that would be great.

reviews.comment:
La YPF quedó muy antigua no solo de apariencia sino que está súper desorganizada hacer pedido, retirar la comida es un caos. Tuve una pésima experiencia. Me quedo con las YPF nuevas que la atención es mejor y brindan mayor comodidad.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF station here is very outdated, not only in appearance but also because ordering and picking up food is incredibly disorganized. I had a terrible experience. I'll stick with the newer YPF stations; the service is better and they're much more convenient.
